events.summary: Feature scaffolded; Phase 0 (Research) opened. Predecessor fitme-story-public-enhancements + ios-code-connect + code-connect-automation all closed/satisfied. Backlog item with 6 deliverables (added FT2 PR #274 squash 044c8ee) is the input. Active-feature lockfile written. Branch feature/fitme-story-website-design-system created.

Phase 0 (Research) approved by user. 11-section research.md captured 6 deliverables, alternatives matrix (chose option A: build in fitme-story), Vercel/Geist as primary reference, primary metric design_system_figma_parity_coverage 57%→95%, kill criteria, sequencing.

Phase 1 (PRD) opened. Drafting PRD with explicit success metrics, kill criteria, analytics spec (4 GA4 events), eval coverage assessment (non-AI feature → auto-pass), and per-deliverable acceptance criteria for all 6 deliverables.

Phase 1 (PRD) approved by user. 14-section PRD locked with primary metric design_system_figma_parity_coverage 57%->95%, 5 kill criteria, 4 GA4 events (screen_scope=design_system), eval gate auto-pass (non-AI feature), all 6 open questions resolved at recommended defaults.

Phase 2 (Tasks) opened. Drafting ~28-32 tasks across 7 buckets per PRD section 13 preview, sequenced per research section 10 (Tokens -> Showcase -> Coverage -> Drift -> Dark-mode -> Contrib -> Analytics+CaseStudy).

Phase 2 (Tasks) approved by user. 30 tasks across 7 buckets (A: tokens 3, B: showcase 6, C: coverage 8, D: drift 5, E: dark-mode 2, F: contrib 1, G: analytics+CS 5). Critical path: T1->T6->(T10-T15)->T18->T20->T21->T26->T29->T30.

Phase 3 (UX/Integration) opened. Phase 3a: /ux preflight to verify referenced tokens/components exist in fitme-story codebase. Phase 3b: draft ux-spec.md for /design-system route. Phase 3c: /design preflight + /design build to push showcase + new component frames into Figma library 'fsjHfFLAHELACZHku8Rfcl'.

Phase 3 (UX/Integration) complete. /ux preflight PASS (existing /design-system page is iOS-narration-heavy; user picked two-part layout). ux-spec.md drafted (15 sections). /design preflight PASS (Figma MCP live, library fsjHfFLAHELACZHku8Rfcl accessible, Code Connect publish blocked but does not gate this feature). /design build folded into Phase 4 (no pre-Phase-4 frames to push; new tokens added in T1; component frames added incrementally T10-T14).

Phase 4 (Implementation) opened. Beginning with Bucket A (T1 motion/elevation/z-index tokens to Figma + Tailwind + design-tokens.ts). Branch: feature/fitme-story-website-design-system. All 30 tasks land on this branch except FT2-side companions (CLAUDE.md, analytics-taxonomy.csv, Makefile target, case study) which ship to FT2 main.

Bucket A complete: T1 added 15 Figma variables to FitMe Tokens collection (motion durations 3, motion easings 3, elevations 4, z-index levels 5). T2 extended globals.css @theme with same tokens + Light/Dark elevation overrides. T3 extended design-tokens.ts with typed MotionToken/ElevationToken/ZIndexToken interfaces and arrays. Build passes; /design-system route still renders.

Bucket B complete (T4-T9): typed manifest with 31 components (12 mapped + 19 unmapped pending Bucket C); 6 showcase components (StatusBadge/TokenSwatch/ComponentCard/VariantGrid/HeritageList/ParitySummaryCard); /design-system page.tsx extended with Part 2 (8 new sections + heritage); /design-system in nav.ts already (T7 no-op); cross-link added to /control-room/framework; SEO metadata extended. Heritage scope expansion: 11 audit decisions + 7 locked patterns captured per user directive 2026-05-10. Bucket H queued (T31-T33) for post-feature site review. Build passes.

Buckets C-G complete. Bucket C: 5 public components mapped via Figma MCP (MobileNav 10-7, Disclosure 10-13, PersonaBar 11-7, PersonaIndicator 11-11, PersonaLens 11-15) + Internal-deferral policy codified; public parity 100%. Bucket D: figma-drift script + 6 unit tests + CI workflow + status doc append. Bucket E: dark-mode parity matrix doc (17/17 public Designed). Bucket F: 9-section CONTRIBUTING-design-system.md. Bucket G T26-T27: 4 GA4 events declared (2 implemented via TrackedSection + TrackedFigmaLink) + analytics-taxonomy.csv updated. Bucket G T28-T29: deferred to operator post-deploy with runbook in state.json. Bucket G T30: case study + showcase MDX slot 27. All 30 in-scope tasks done; 3 Bucket H tasks queued post-feature.

Phase 4 (Implementation) complete. 30/30 in-scope tasks done across 6 shipped buckets (A motion/elevation/z-index tokens, B showcase route, C component coverage, D drift detection, E dark-mode matrix, F contribution doc, G analytics + case study). 2 tasks deferred to operator post-deploy with runbook (T28 GA4 DebugView + T29 Lighthouse). 3 tasks queued post-feature for Bucket H site audit (T31-T33).

Phase 5 (Testing) opened. In-session: figma-drift unit tests 6/6 pass; npm run build passes; figma-drift CLI dry-run exits 0 with 0 findings. Deferred to operator post-deploy: T28 GA4 DebugView verification, T29 Lighthouse on staging preview.

Phase 5 (Testing) complete in-session. CI: npm run build passes (verified across Buckets A+B+C+D+G). Unit tests: 6 figma-drift tests pass via npx tsx --test. figma-drift CLI dry-run: 0 findings on first-run snapshot. Operator post-deploy work deferred: T28 GA4 DebugView verification, T29 Lighthouse run on /design-system staging preview (a11y >=95, perf >=80, LCP <=2.0s p75 targets).

Phase 6 (Review) opened. /ux pre-merge-review: ux-spec.md approved scope matches shipped Part 2 page structure (8 sections); ComponentCard layout matches §3 of ux-spec; new tokens (motion + elevation + z-index) match §4 values; a11y patterns (focus rings, 44pt touch, reduced-motion blanket) honored. /design pre-merge-review: state.json.figma_node_ids populated (22 node IDs across 17 .figma.tsx files); PR descriptions will reference these once PRs open. Internal-deferral policy noted as scope revision from PRD §4 deliverable #2.
Phase 6 (Review) approved. Both /ux + /design pre-merge-review PASS. CI green on both PRs (Vercel + audit + drift + gates + Build/Test + integrity + pm-framework/pr-integrity all pass).
Phase 7 (Merge) — user explicit approval received. Marking both PRs ready (out of draft) + squash-merging.

Both PRs merged. fitme-story #81 squash 9fc0fce. FT2 #287 squash 2e00e18. Branches deleted. fitme-story main now contains the showcase route + drift detection + heritage data + dark-mode matrix + contribution doc + analytics events. FT2 main now contains case study + scaffolding + analytics-taxonomy + Makefile target.
Phase 8 (Documentation) opened post-merge. Tasks: cross-doc updates (CLAUDE.md design system section), memory entry, kill-criteria review schedule.
fitme-story-public-enhancements:foundation-T18-T21 (L3)

Phase 8 (Documentation) complete. Memory entry added: project_fitme_story_website_design_system_shipped.md. MEMORY.md index updated. state.json transitioned to current_phase: complete with merge commits captured (FT2 2e00e18, fitme-story 9fc0fce). Post-deploy operator items captured: T28 GA4 DebugView + T29 Lighthouse.

Feature COMPLETE. Total wall time 167 min across 9 phases. Primary metric design_system_figma_parity_coverage achieved 100% public parity (target ≥95%). 30/30 in-scope tasks done; 2 deferred to operator post-deploy (T28 GA4 DebugView + T29 Lighthouse); 3 queued post-feature for Bucket H site audit (T31-T33). Kill-criteria review schedule set (week 1: 2026-05-17 LCP guardrail; 30d: 2026-06-09 drift + dark-mode; 60d: 2026-07-09 contribution adoption).
Feature transitioning to current_phase=complete. All 9 phases approved. Both PRs merged. Memory entry + kill-criteria schedule + Bucket H queued. Total measured wall time: 169 min.
